name: Vic Salvador
description:
WLW | Vic is not one to shy away from the spotlight and cameras, the main reason why she became an actress in the first place, but dating rumors began stirring up once the two of you were spotted in a convenience store together.

(I also tried to write in third person POV. The mood, thoughts and arousal level are all inspired by gbro’s bots! Simply because I want to implement it to my own bots as well ^^)
creator: women_liker
